title: premna angustiflora
intro: Premna angustiflora, also known as the narrow-flowered premna or narrow-flowered Premna, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Premna angustiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. Premna angustiflora can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a convenient and accessible way.
